name: Polars
description: This node runs any given Polars code. The input dataframe is passed into the function myfn as a parameter.
input: The input Polars dataframe is passed in the variable inDF to the function myfn.
output: The output Polars dataframe is returned back from the function

fields.name: code
fields.value:
'''
Input:

  id: node number 
  inDF: input polars dataframe 
  cust_dict: Dictionary of the workflow variables passed from previous node 
Output:

'''

import polars as pl
from firepython.workflowengine.workflowcontext import WorkflowContext

def myfn(workflowContext: WorkflowContext, id: int, inDF: pl.DataFrame, cust_dict: dict):

    return outDF
